cloudtweaks.title: Cloud Tweaks
cloudtweaks.desc.add_layer: Add a new cloud layer with default settings
cloudtweaks.desc.rain_color: Color for rain clouds, shown when raining
cloudtweaks.desc.thunder_color: Color for thunder clouds, shown during thunderstorms
cloudtweaks.desc.lighting: Settings related to cloud lighting and shading
cloudtweaks.desc.light: Configure a directional light source that affects cloud shading. Can be used to simulate the sun or moon.
cloudtweaks.desc.layers: Configure individual cloud layers, each with its own height, color, and movement settings.
cloudtweaks.option.name: Name
cloudtweaks.desc.fade_to_color: Color that clouds will fade to when fade is enabled. Only applies if color fade is enabled.
cloudtweaks.desc.static_fade_rel_y: Reference Y position (in blocks) for static fade mode. Determines the vertical position the fade effect is calculated from. Typically set to 0 for ground level.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.shading_enabled: Enable shading when the sun is behind clouds
cloudtweaks.tooltip.speed_warning: Machine destroyer, please do not set this to lightspeed
cloudtweaks.tooltip.section.load_presets: Select and load a saved cloud configuration preset
cloudtweaks.tooltip.load_preset: Choose a preset from the dropdown and it will be loaded immediately when you close this screen
cloudtweaks.tooltip.section.save_preset: Save your current cloud configuration as a new preset for easy reuse
cloudtweaks.tooltip.preset_id: Unique technical identifier (a-z, 0-9, -, _). Auto-generated if left blank. Used internally to reference this preset.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.preset_name: User-friendly display name. This is what appears in dropdowns. Example: 'Sunset Sky', 'Fantasy Clouds', 'Storm Clouds'
cloudtweaks.tooltip.preset_desc: Optional notes about this preset. Example: 'Orange and purple colors for fantasy biomes' or 'Dark stormy look'
cloudtweaks.tooltip.save_preset_button: Creates a new preset with the current cloud settings. Fill in Name at minimum.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.section.share_import: Export your configuration for sharing, or import configs from others
cloudtweaks.tooltip.export_config: Encodes your current configuration as a shareable Base64 string. Click the field and copy the text to share with others.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.import_config: Paste a Base64 or JSON configuration string here that you received from someone else. Can be from chat, forums, or files.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.import_button: Applies the pasted configuration immediately. Your current settings will be backed up automatically.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.section.manage_prese: View, load, edit, or delete your saved presets. Presets from resource packs can be imported as local copies.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.presets_list: All your saved presets and available resource pack presets. Click Load to apply, Edit to change name/description, or Delete to remove.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.delete_preset: Removes this preset. A backup is saved automatically.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.load_preset_action: Load this preset and apply its cloud settings immediately. Enter anything to trigger.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.delete_preset_action: Remove this preset from your saved list. A backup is created automatically. Enter anything to trigger.
cloudtweaks.tooltip.import_resource_pres: Copy this resource pack preset to your local presets so you always have it available, even without the resource pack. Enter anything to trigger.
cloudtweaks.presets.save_new.tooltip: Save your current settings as a new preset
cloudtweaks.presets.reset_to_default.too: Reset all settings to the default configuration. Your presets will NOT be deleted.
cloudtweaks.presets.export_base64.toolti: Copy this string to share your current config
cloudtweaks.presets.import_paste.tooltip: Paste a Base64-encoded preset string to import
cloudtweaks.presets.import_button.toolti: Import the preset from Base64 string
cloudtweaks.presets.name: Preset Name
cloudtweaks.presets.name.tooltip: Edit the display name of this preset
cloudtweaks.presets.copy_to_clipboard.to: Copy this preset to your clipboard as Base64
cloudtweaks.presets.preview.tooltip: Open full preview of this preset's configuration
cloudtweaks.presets.base64.tooltip: Copy this string to share the preset
cloudtweaks.presets.duplicate.tooltip: Create a copy of this preset
cloudtweaks.presets.no_presets.tooltip: Create a new preset using Quick Actions or Import
cloudtweaks.preview.title: Preview:
cloudtweaks.preview.total_layers.tooltip: Number of cloud layers in this preset
cloudtweaks.preview.grid_size.tooltip: Resolution of the cloud mesh grid
cloudtweaks.option.edit.tooltip: Edit all layer settings in a dedicated screen
